hard_rule.rule: 只要存在可绕过 Fail-Closed 的路径，decision=FAIL

reasons.description: 恶意意图检测模式已实现，12种模式覆盖绕过风控、无限制自动下单、欺诈等场景
Engine 层 DENY 阻断机制确保 status='gate_denied', publish_result=None
reasons.evidence: engine.py:246-257 decision=='DENY' 时立即返回，阻断后续执行

reasons.description: PackPublish has_deny 检测强制 success=False, publish_status='rejected'
reasons.evidence: pack_publish.py:298-309 has_deny 检测; pack_publish.py:582-584 强制 rejected

reasons.description: 双重阻断机制 (Engine + PackPublish) 确保无单点失效
ruling 对象已提升到顶层输出，包含 verdict/rule_id/evidence_ref/blocked
reasons.evidence: engine.py:504-528 提取 top-level ruling 和 ruling_path

reasons.description: gate_decisions 结构完整，在 DENY 返回前已填充
reasons.evidence: engine.py:241-244 gate_decisions.append() 和 artifacts 存储

paths_examined.description: gate_evaluator is None 时 gate 节点走 regular node 路径
paths_examined.analysis: 即使 gate_evaluator=None，constitution_gate.execute() 仍返回 DENY，PackPublish 会检测到
ConstitutionGate 所有返回路径都包含 decision 字段，gate_decisions 必然非空

paths_examined.description: 恶意意图通过 intent_parse 绕过
paths_examined.analysis: constitution_gate.py:140-149 同时检查 input.natural_language 和 intent_parse.original_text
12种模式覆盖主要恶意场景，未知模式通过 risk_score 阈值评估

bypass_path_analysis.conclusion: 无可绕过 Fail-Closed 的路径

evidence_refs.description: MALICIOUS_INTENT_PATTERNS 定义 12 种恶意模式
恶意意图检测逻辑，匹配后返回 DENY + ruling.blocked=true
Engine 层 DENY 阻断：status='gate_denied', publish_result=None
gate_decisions 记录和 artifacts 存储
top-level ruling 和 ruling_path 提取

expected_flow: constitution_gate 检测到 '绕过风控' 和 '无限制自动下单'
killer_test_a_status.verification: 代码审查确认实现符合预期流程

no_t2_t3_modification.evidence: 仅修改 T1 指定文件: constitution_gate.py, engine.py, pack_publish.py

no_bypass_compliance.evidence: 双重阻断机制确保 DENY 无法被绕过

final_assessment.summary: T1 实现满足 Fail-Closed 硬规则要求。恶意意图检测覆盖 12 种模式，双重阻断机制 (Engine + PackPublish) 确保无单点失效，ruling 输出完整。无可绕过 Fail-Closed 的路径。
conditions: 假设 gate_evaluator 在生产环境正确配置
假设无运行时 artifacts 篡改
假设输入数据未被恶意构造以绕过 gate 收集
